message:
chore: update beads tracker, Cargo.lock, and workspace Cargo.toml

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1393,6 +1393,28 @@ dependencies = [
  "zeroize",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "cryptoki"
+version = "0.12.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "ff765b99fc49f3116c9a908484486a2b92fd73c48da45c3a69716471c6cc56c6"
+dependencies = [
+ "bitflags",
+ "cryptoki-sys",
+ "libloading",
+ "log",
+ "secrecy",
+]
+
+[[package]]
+name = "cryptoki-sys"
+version = "0.5.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "f1fd850498411e4057f1cba79e6e2bc7cbe960544c1046ab46d4685c403a1121"
+dependencies = [
+ "libloading",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "ctr"
 version = "0.9.2"

  "bytes",
  "chrono",
  "ciborium",
+ "cryptoki",
  "ed25519-dalek",

  "fcp-core",

 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "async-trait",
+ "base64 0.22.1",
  "chrono",
  "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
  "fcp-sdk",
  "fcp-testkit",
  "hex",

  "reqwest 0.13.2",
+ "rsa",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "sha2",

  "thiserror 2.0.18",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
+ "url",
  "uuid",
  "wiremock",
 ]
@@ -4961,11 +4988,15 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-manifest",
  "fcp-store",
  "futures-util",
+ "hex",
+ "hmac",
  "jsonschema",
+ "percent-encoding",

  "pkcs1",

+ "sha2",
  "signature",
  "spki",
  "subtle",
@@ -10459,6 +10491,15 @@ dependencies = [
  "cc",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "secrecy"
+version = "0.10.3"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "e891af845473308773346dc847b2c23ee78fe442e0472ac50e22a18a93d3ae5a"
+dependencies = [
+ "zeroize",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "security-framework"
 version = "2.11.1"

@@ -249,10 +249,12 @@ sha2 = "0.10"
 chacha20poly1305 = "0.10"
 hpke = "0.12"
 coset = "0.4"
+cryptoki = "0.12.0"
 zeroize = { version = "1.8", features = ["derive"] }
 subtle = "2.6"
 rand = "0.8"
 rand_core = "0.6"
+rsa = { version = "0.9", features = ["sha2"] }
 
 # Identifiers
 uuid = { version = "1.21", features = ["v4", "v5", "serde"] }
